canonical_name: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
description: Mexican criminal organization originating in Santa Rosa de Lima, Guanajuato, founded in 2014 by José Antonio Yépez Ortiz alias 'El Marro'. Known primarily for fuel theft (huachicoleo) and drug trafficking, it has been in violent conflict with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Despite leadership arrests, the group remains active.

country_links.evidence_quote: el cártel se reforzó por exmilitares y paramilitares colombianos, prueba de ello es su participación en ataques con explosivos, secuestros y masacres.
country_links.context: The cartel reinforced itself with Colombian ex-military and paramilitaries, who participated in attacks with explosives, kidnappings, and massacres.

country_links.evidence_quote: resaltando dos ciudadanos de origen peruano y varios sicarios oriundos de los estados de Durango, Guanajuato, y uno más de Guadalajara
country_links.context: Two Peruvian citizens were among five cartel members arrested in Mexico City, indicating the cartel has Peruvian members.
